zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Ruggles於1558年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利時，他的父親Nicholas Ruggles36歲，母親Mrs Nicholas Ruggles30歲。他於1584年與Magery Danridge在英國素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1647年享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴貝。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Ruggles was born in 1558, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Ruggles, was 36 and his mother, Mrs Nicholas Ruggles, was 30. He married Magery Danridge in 1584, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1647, at the age of 89, and was buried in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Ruggles est né en 1558, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Ruggles, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nicholas Ruggles, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Magery Danridge en 1584, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1647, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Babergh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Ruggles 1558 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Ruggles 36 und seine Mutter Mrs Nicholas Ruggles 30. Er hat 1584 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England Magery Danridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1647 im Alter von 89 Jahren und wurde in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Ruggles è nato il nel 1558 nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Ruggles, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Nicholas Ruggles, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Magery Danridge nel 1584, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1647, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Babergh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ruggles(이)가 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Ruggles(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Nicholas Ruggles(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1584년 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 Magery Danridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1647년 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베이버그h에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Magery Danridge em 1584, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Ruggles родился в 1558 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Ruggles было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nicholas Ruggles, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Magery Danridge в 1584 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1647 г. в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности бабирг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
